question.label: Self-read opener
question.name: Before I share my view, how do you think the last stretch has gone?
question.description: Anchors the conversation in their self-assessment first; gap vs manager's view becomes a signal.

answer: I think I am shipping, but I am not sure I am aiming at the highest-leverage work yet.

assessment.note: He can self-identify a leverage problem despite active delivery — strong clarity gap on what matters most, with some ownership still present.

new_queue.label: Highest-leverage work
new_queue.name: When you say 'highest-leverage work,' what work are you thinking of specifically?

new_queue.label: What they're proud of
new_queue.name: What's something from the last quarter you're genuinely proud of — not what looks good, what actually was good?

new_queue.label: Principal scope
new_queue.name: What does Principal scope mean on this team to you?

new_queue.label: Gap awareness
new_queue.name: Where do you think you've fallen short of where you want to be?

new_queue.label: Question pattern
new_queue.name: In the last month, where have you held back from asking a question you had?

new_queue.label: Safety mode
new_queue.name: What makes it easier to stay in execution mode rather than push the decision earlier?

new_queue.label: Early alignment
new_queue.name: What do you usually want to have settled before you bring others in?

new_queue.label: Commitment closer
new_queue.name: What will you do differently on early alignment before we next meet?

history.answer_excerpt: I think I am shipping, but I am not sure I am aiming at the highest-leverage work yet.
I think I am shipping, but I am not sure I am aiming at the highest-leverage work yet.
